ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course */,
  "clbid" INTEGER /* Course catalog number */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits awarded for completion */,
  "crsid" INTEGER /* Course registration number */,
  "department_ids" TEXT /* List of department IDs related to the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content */,
  "gereqs" TEXT /* General education requirements satisfied by the course */,
  "groupid" INTEGER /* Group ID for course categorization */,
  "grouptype" TEXT /* Type of course grouping */,
  "halfcredit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is half-credit */,
  "instructors" TEXT /* List of instructors teaching the course */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "locations" TEXT /* Locations where the course is held */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the course */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Unique course number */,
  "pn" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is a special consideration */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisites for the course */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester during which the course is offered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the course (active, inactive) */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Term of the course */,
  "times" TEXT /* Scheduled times for the course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., lecture, seminar) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is offered */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is elective */,
  "course_url" TEXT /* URL to the course's online materials or website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the course was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the course record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the course record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructors FOREIGN KEY ("instructors") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_ids FOREIGN KEY ("department_ids") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for departmental inquiries */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chair */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the department's office */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the department's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID to which the instructor belongs */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Schedule of the instructor's office hours */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study for the student */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current grade point average of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's enrollment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the enrollment occurs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (active, withdrawn) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of classes attended by the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the schedule record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the schedule */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the course (e.g., MWF 0905-1000) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can attend the class */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the schedule record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
